metadata.description: Three words: kickoff when you start, wrapup when you finish, quiz-me when you're not sure. Finds your unknowns so the agent guesses less. Based on Thariq's 'A Field Guide to Fable: Finding Your Unknowns'.

plugins.name: unknown-unknowns
plugins.description: Three commands mapped to moments you actually feel: kickoff (diagnoses your unknowns before you start — blind spot briefings, premise challenges, throwaway prototypes, feasibility spikes, one-question interviews, reference extraction, unknowns-first plans), wrapup (buy-in doc + understanding quiz before merge, then banks the learnings), and quiz-me (strict PASS / NOT YET understanding check). Nine techniques — eight from Thariq's field guide plus a premise-challenge falsification pass — live inside as the agent's internal toolbox.
